attr.title: The Wratch's Den
attr.desc: Turn-based dungeon-keeper roguelite by PUNKCAKE Delicieux. Design rooms, summon minions, and defend your den from heroes.
attr.desc_md:
The Wratch's Den is a turn-based dungeon-keeper roguelite: design rooms, summon and upgrade minions, and defend your den from waves of heroes.

This port uses [Machismo](https://github.com/bmdhacks/machismo) to run the native Apple Silicon (arm64) Mac build directly on aarch64 Linux — no CPU emulation needed.
attr.inst: Requires game files from itch.io or Steam. See README.md for install instructions.
attr.inst_md:
## Installation

1. Buy the game on [itch.io](https://punkcake.itch.io/wratchs-den) or [Steam](https://store.steampowered.com/app/2881260/The_Wratchs_Den/)
2. Download the macOS build
3. Place `the_wratchs_den.app/` in `wratchsden/gamedata/`
4. Launch the game
